# Virginia approves AI cameras to catch traffic violations

**TL;DR:** Virginia has passed a law allowing automated AI-powered cameras to enforce stop sign and crosswalk violations across the state.

A new Virginia law authorizes the use of artificial intelligence-powered cameras to enforce traffic violations at stop signs and crosswalks. The technology aims to improve public safety by automatically detecting and documenting these violations. This represents an expansion of traffic enforcement technology in the state.

**Why it matters:** Chesterfield residents may encounter AI-enforced traffic cameras at local intersections and crosswalks, potentially resulting in citations for violations detected by automated systems rather than officers.

[Read the source at Google News: Virginia Government →](https://news.google.?oc=5)
